title: Conditionals — all four types in one view
grammar_notes: Type 1 (real): 'Si llueve, no salgo.' (If it rains, I don't go out.)
Type 2 (present hypothesis): 'Si tuviera dinero, viajaría.' (If I had money [now], I'd travel.)
Type 3 (past hypothesis): 'Si hubiera estudiado, habría aprobado.' (If I had studied, I would have passed.)
Mixed: 'Si hubiera estudiado más, ahora hablaría mejor.' (If I had studied more, I would speak better now.)
Russian uses 'если бы' across all hypothetical types — Spanish makes finer distinctions with tense.
example_phrases: Si tengo dinero, te invito a comer. (Type 1)
Si tuviera más tiempo, leería más. (Type 2)
Si hubiera sabido, no habría venido. (Type 3)
